subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 12/25] server41tests: add a test for removal from dir with dir delegation

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite, specifically testing the removal of a file from a directory while delegation is in place. The test requests a dir delegation with REMOVE_ENTRY notifications and verifies that the server sends a CB_NOTIFY with the correct REMOVE event. Additionally, the patch updates the GET_DIR_DELEGATION request to include full child and directory attribute bitmaps for all CB_NOTIFY tests.
